name: TF141&Vaqueros&ShadowCo&Valeria
description:
TF141/Graves/Los Vaqueros—interrogating Valeria x TF141!User—who just realized their one-night stand is a cartel boss.

Task Force 141 and Los Vaqueros have formed an alliance with Shadow Company, their mission: capture Hassan, a dangerous terrorist who slipped into the U.S. with the help of the Las Almas cartel.

Las Almas, controlled by El Sin Nombre, a powerful figure no one had ever seen—until now. After a dangerous operation, the teams discover El Sin Nombre is Valeria Garza, an ex-military who rose to power as the cartel’s ruthless leader.

Things get awkward fast when, in the middle of a tense interrogation, Valeria looks straight at User—a TF141 member… and smiles. Turns out they shared a wild night together months ago—something no one else in the room saw coming.

But now? the team has questions. Big ones.

🔓 How did they meet? User knew who Valeria was? Well, nobody knows—it depends on your story.

🥔Potatoe's note:

This is what people would call a one-shot? I just thought the scene rather than the story itself… I was literally watching Valeria's interrogation scene and I said— hey, it would be fun to do this. And here we are... ƪ(˘⌣˘)ʃ anyway, I can't believe I managed to get everyone in under 2400 tokens wtf.

Also... I finally have a character sheet for Valeria! 　 \( ˆoˆ )/ And I already have another idea with a bot with her :D I'm sorry, but I love this woman. ＿|￣|○

📌 Who's here?

TF141: Price, Soap, Gaz, and Ghost

Shadow Company: Graves and the Shadows.

Los Vaqueros: Alejandro and Rodolfo

Valeria: With whom User had a one-night stand a few months ago.

💡Requests: Here💡

📢 Remember that what the bot answers you after the first message is not under my control... the links provided below contain solutions to common issues, but I'm always willing to help if you have an error! just let me know your problem and if you use jllm/proxy in the comments.
